hooks.command: python scripts/provenance_gate.py 2>/dev/null | tail -1 | python -c "import sys,json; line=sys.stdin.read().strip(); print(json.dumps({'systemMessage': '[gate] '+line} if line else {}))" || true
python scripts/provenance_gate.py >/dev/null 2>&1 || echo '[gate] new finding introduced by this edit — run: python scripts/provenance_gate.py'
